scripts.build: astro build && mkdir -p dist/app dist/data dist/tools && cp -r app/js app/css app/assets dist/app/ && cp data/trigram_calendar.json dist/data/ && cp -r data/trigram-word-lists dist/data/ && cp -r tools/label dist/tools/ && cp og-image.png site.webmanifest dist/
scripts.test:all: npm run test && npm run test:e2e
